title: papaver somniferum var. setigerum
intro: Papaver somniferum var. setigerum, also known as the set-leaf poppy or Himalayan poppy, is a variety of the opium poppy plant that is native to the Himalayan region. It contains medicinal properties, primarily alkaloids like morphine and codeine, which are used to treat pain and other medical conditions. The health benefits of Papaver somniferum var. setigerum include its potential to alleviate chronic pain, coughs, and respiratory issues, as well as its use in traditional medicine to treat insomnia and anxiety. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of tinctures, teas, and capsules, although it is essential to note that its use should be under medical supervision due to its potential for addiction and side effects.
